sections.paragraph: Ch. adv. afterwards, then, i.q. Heb. אָז, אֲזַי, prop. times, from the singular אֲדֵא (from the root אָדָה = עָדָה, אָזָה to pass by); Dan 2:15, 17 , 19 בֵּאדַיִן prop. “at the same time,” i.e. immediately; Dan 2:14, 35 3:13 , 19 , 21 , 26 , אֱדַיִן “from that time forth;” Ezr 5:16, i.q. Heb. מֵאָז. [But see אָז .]
